02 / 11
Foundations

American vs. European Options

Rigid · Deterministic

European Option

Exercisable only on the exact maturity date. Mathematically rigid, closed-form friendly, no path dependency.

Single exercise point at maturity (T)
Black-Scholes closed-form valid
No early-exercise optionality premium
Flexible · Path-Dependent

American Option

Exercisable at ANY point up until maturity. Introduces flexible human choice, path dependency, and deep behavioral complexity.

Continuous exercise window [0, T]
Requires Longstaff-Schwartz / LSM
Embeds behavioral optionality value
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
03 / 11
Data Harvesting

Apple Inc. Baseline · 2020 – 2024

Before projecting forward, the engine ingests five years of Apple price history to map the empirical baseline — the historical DNA that calibrates every downstream simulation.

Realized Annualized Vol
31.66%
Window
2020 – 2024
Trading Days
~1,260
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
04 / 11
Mathematical Assumption

Normal Innovations Drive the Engine

Geometric Brownian Motion assumes the continuous structural innovations driving daily prices are log-normally distributed. Apple's empirical returns substantially follow this bell-curve — validating GBM as our baseline kernel.

Daily Sigma (σ)
0.0199
Distribution Fit
Approx. Normal
Caveat
Empirical tails are fatter than Normal — motivating the jump-diffusion upgrade in later slides.
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
05 / 11
Projection

Generating 10,000 Potential Futures

Using the calibrated normal distribution, the engine generates 10,000 completely independent future price trajectories. The deeper into the time horizon, the wider the fan-out — uncertainty expands as a function of √t.

Simulated Paths
10,000
Horizon
1 Year · 50 Steps
Strike (K)
$250.60
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
06 / 11
Boundary Conditions

Intrinsic Value Distribution at Maturity

At expiration the distribution is dramatically bimodal: a massive spike at $0 for out-of-the-money paths (worthless options), followed by a long right tail of deep in-the-money payoffs that drive corporate liability.

OTM Paths (Worthless)
~52%
Right-Tail Maximum
~$175
Mean Payoff
$22.41
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
07 / 11
Reality Check

The 2025 Market Crash Backtest

On paper, the model predicted a perfect 100% profit margin under rational optimal-hold behavior. Then April 2025 happened — Apple plunged to $198.85, and humans pulled the panic cord.

Stochastic Human Behavioral Attrition
Real underwriters must price behavioral irrationality. When anxiety spikes, suboptimal early exercise becomes structurally certain.
April Bottom
$198.85
Maturity Close
$271.86
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
08 / 11
Structural Upgrade

Merton Jump-Diffusion · The Shock Shield

Standard continuous drift is structurally blind to sudden crashes. We layered discrete Poisson jump shocks on top of the GBM kernel — explicitly modeling violent downward price gaps that mirror real macro events.

Premium · GBM Only
$24.18
Premium · Jump-Diffusion
$32.49
Net Effect
+$8.31 risk-premium uplift insulates the balance sheet against tail events the Normal kernel cannot see.
QUANTDERIV · Underwriting Platform
09 / 11
Dynamic Market States

Markov Regime-Switching Engine

Regime Topology

Calm ↔ Stress · Transition Matrix

Calm Regime
σ = 18%

Steady expansion · low realized vol · narrow trajectories.

Capital-Efficient Quote
$22.52
Stress Regime
σ = 48%

Turbulent · violent dispersion · fat-tail risk dominates.

Defensive Premium
$38.74

Markets shift between steady expansion and sudden turbulence. The regime switcher colors each simulated path by latent state — because the engine knows stress is transient, it can quote competitively during calm windows.

Transition Probabilities
Calm → Calm0.94
Calm → Stress0.06
Stress → Stress0.78
Stress → Calm0.22
Capital Efficiency Gain
+27%

10 / 11
Diversification

Multi-Asset Book · Modern Portfolio Theory

To eliminate single-stock tail risk, the book spans four uncorrelated assets. When tech sold off, Gold and SPY absorbed the liquidations.

AAPL
Mega-Cap Tech
NVDA
High-Beta Growth
GLD
Safe-Haven Hedge
SPY
Macro Index Anchor
Net Portfolio P&L
+$112,816
